title: The Merchant???
description: A suspicious merchant with a peculiar inventory offers you a chance to purchase mysterious relics. However, they seem quite volatile...
conditions: At least 100 Gold OR possession of Foul Potion
notes: This is a [blue]custom event[/blue] with no traditional options. The player interacts with a merchant through a custom UI to browse and purchase relics. The merchant stocks [gold]6 random relics[/gold] from a pool of 9 possible fakes: Fake Anchor, Fake Blood Vial, Fake Happy Flower, Fake Lee's Waffle, Fake Mango, Fake Orichalcum, Fake Snecko Eye, Fake Strike Dummy, and Fake Venerable Tea Set. Each relic costs [gold]50 Gold[/gold]. If a [red]Foul Potion[/red] is thrown during the encounter, it triggers a fight ([gold]FakeMerchantEventEncounter[/gold]). After defeating the merchant, the player receives [gold]Fake Merchant's Rug[/gold] plus all unsold relics from the inventory.
